Join two versions' scores and compute per-key deltas (pure)

Source: R/validate.R
score_delta.Rd

Inner-joins two score tables on key and returns the paired values plus delta = value_b - value_a. Pure (data-frame in, data-frame out) so it can be unit-tested without a database.

Usage

score_delta(
  df_a,
  df_b,
  key = "programarea_key",
  value = "score",
  labels = c("a", "b")
)

Arguments

df_a, df_b

data frames each with columns key and value

key

join column name (default "programarea_key")

value

value column name (default "score")

labels

length-2 suffixes for the two versions (default c("a","b"))

Value

a tibble with key, <value>_<labels[1]>, <value>_<labels[2]>, delta, sorted by descending abs(delta)

On this page
